title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six "power phrases" to use in Claude Code prompts that he claims can accelerate development workflows. He recommends specific prompt engineering techniques attributed to Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, along with one cautionary phrase to avoid that he claims wastes time and money.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six "power phrases" for Claude Code prompts that he says speed up development workflows. The video attributes specific prompt engineering techniques to Claude Code's creator and to Andrej Karpathy, and it flags one phrase to avoid that he claims wastes time and money. The takeaway is a small set of reusable prompt patterns, plus the cautionary phrase, aimed at getting better results from Claude Code.
